chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 142 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.1423/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.1424/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For orders on MA No.1425/2024 (Rule Nisi) 5. For hearing of main case 22.03.2024 Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Bhutto, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 5. Applicant has filed this application U/S 491 CrPC seeking recovery of alleged detenues Muzamil Shahid, Eeman Fatima and Muhammad Younis, aged about 10, 07 and 04 years, respectively, who are his children and in custody of Mst. Sanam, respondent No.6, his ex-wife. It has transpired that applicant has already filed an application before the Family Judge under relevant provision of Guardian and Wards Act seeking custody of his children, which is still pending. In view of above, this criminal miscellaneous application is not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed in limine along with listed applications. J U D G E Abdul Basit
